Semantic zoom browser for the L0/L1/L2/L3 reference hierarchy. L3 key phrase nodes are colored by L2 cluster; Korea activation and gap views use the same reference denominator.

Type a phrase to list matching L3 nodes.

Semantic zoom uses blended transitions: L0, L0+L1, L1+L2, L2+L3, then L3. This previews representative labels before the user fully zooms into a local region.

Scroll to zoom · drag to pan · hover on nodes for metadata
